title: Citation Flagmap
description: Maps a canonical methods-paper citation to the pipeline flag-set it implies. Governs files at kb/citations/{slug}.yaml.

doi.description: DOI of the methods paper, starting with '10.'.

tool.description: Tool whose flags are implied by this citation.

flag.description: Flag name as it appears on the command line.

value.description: Implied value for the flag; any type allowed.

implied_flags.description: Flags and values implied by the citation's described methodology.

basis.description: Why this citation implies these flags (quote, section reference, etc.).

provenance.description: Who curated this mapping and when.

supersedes.description: DOIs of earlier mappings this one supersedes.
